content: Where is the gear/pizza tab?
in the team formation
there
above the Wheel
Thank you two 🤣
But why would they remove it from the menu?
I mean, that's not exactly the way it should be. We should have the option to change it right from character section.
Btw, got the new girl. I have no idea how her skill worked but I just pulled for her. Her animations look really nice too. 😂
I agree
I like the new quick formation
But I hope we will get back the option to change wheel, pizza from the character’s menu
but we now can use one wheel on few characters
and pizza's part too
it's more easy i think 😞
Lets say you want to upgrade a pizza or reroll a pizza. Then you'd have to go to a stage like you want to start a battle
No man, that counterintuitive.
I agree that the stage one makes it easier but both of them should be available.
Not one of the completely removed and put in that place.
use your brain
they remove it because you dont need to single equip them anymore
For example
Lily from team 1 can use a different equipment of Lily from team 2

also A different character from team 2 can equip the same set of Lily from 1 without removing it from Lily like before and so on for the other teams, as long as characters on the same team don't equip the same equipment you dont need to replace it out
you also don't need to single equip Life wheel in the same way
1 character can equip the same life wheel as long as they are not in the same team
Mean what? You actually don't need to farm that much relic for them anymore

and why do they remove it? Because as long as you don't remove it, the gear should be marked that someone is using that piece and you cannot equip it on another character even though they are not even in the same team
I agree to the point that without the relic/wheel tab it's a bit inconvenient but the inconvenience here cannot be compared to the convenience it brings when you can equip relic widely as possible.
The fact that you responded with me using my brain dissolves my resolution to read all that text.
If I wasn't using "my brain" in the first place, I wouldnt pin point this as an issue.
the fact that you actually asked why is already a big issue, but well whatever. TL;DR, thing happened, go with it.
not like whining here can change thing

In the first place, this is "English Chat", I do not understand most of what's written in the game.

Secondly, I made the issue of upgrading and rerolling pizza's.

Thirdly, we are merely communicating, you did not need to resort to insulting me.

And the fact that I asked why is not a big issue, because if you actually have a brain, you would know that other games make this an option.

Like I mentioned above, if you actually read my statement properly. I said "an option" which meant that both should have stayed.
Now I'm going to reiterate on why I said, I don't like that the character menu selection got removed, now I'm having a hard time picking their old equiment back cuz I've forgotten some.

As much as the quick selection is good, I think having predetermined set from character menu is still a good thing. 

Then you can start talking about changing it from the team selection menu if you want to build something different.

Also, it was a good thing to be able to level up those already selected pizza's from character menu. Now everything looks a bit jumbled in my mind. 

Its gonna take a while getting used to.

<@543093645947961348> I'm really sorry that we didn't find a way to inherit your previous data when we made this modification, and the guidance on the UI was not sufficient. I apologize for any inconvenience this has caused you! Thank you for overcoming language barriers to play our game. As a game developer, I feel very fortunate, and we will strive to do better!

Much appreciated. 
You have a great game at hand, keep up the good work.
I've only just noticed this button. 😂😂😂
